test_name: document title matches AdminDashboard in Angular; React app uses different title
angular_behavior: Document title is AdminDashboard.

test_name: unauthenticated user visiting home is sent to 401 in Angular; React does not show 401 page
angular_behavior: Visiting /home without a session shows the 401 - Unauthorized view.
react_behavior: Same URL shows the static placeholder; no 401 view.

test_name: login page shows Login heading, Email and Password fields in Angular; React has no full login form
angular_behavior: Login page with heading "Login", float labels for Email and Password, submit button.
react_behavior: No login form or fields on /login; app is a static stub.

test_name: post-login shell shows Home, Orders, Users navigation in Angular; React has no app navigation
angular_behavior: After admin login, sidebar has Home, Orders, Users links and Logout.
react_behavior: No sidebar or app navigation links on any URL.

test_name: home dashboard shows Home heading and welcome copy in Angular; React has neither
angular_behavior: Heading "Home" and line "Welcome back, Admin!".
react_behavior: Not present; only the scaffold paragraph.

test_name: home dashboard includes statistics chart card headers in Angular; React has none of these sections
angular_behavior: Three chart card headers: successful transactions, users, payment status distribution.

test_name: payment orders list has Payment Orders title and global search in Angular; React is missing the orders table UI
angular_behavior: Page title "Payment Orders", global search, filterable table.
react_behavior: No title or orders UI on /payment-orders.

test_name: payment orders table lists Payment Reference column in Angular; React does not show this table
angular_behavior: Sortable table with Payment Reference and related columns.

test_name: payment order details page shows order layout sections in Angular; React has no details page
angular_behavior: Detail layout with "Payment Order Details" heading, Payment Details and Customer sections.

test_name: user management page shows User Management title and user form in Angular; React is missing the page
angular_behavior: Heading "User Management", first name field and form.
react_behavior: /users is still the static placeholder only.

test_name: users table shows Actions column in Angular; React has no data table
angular_behavior: User table with Actions column and row actions.

test_name: HTTP 404 route shows Not Found page in Angular; React does not render 404 view
angular_behavior: Unknown paths show 404 - Not Found with copy and link.
react_behavior: Any path still shows the same single-page stub.

test_name: forbidden page shows 403 - Forbidden in Angular; React has no 403 view
angular_behavior: /403 shows 403 - Forbidden and explanatory text.

test_name: unauthorized page shows 401 - Unauthorized in Angular; React has no 401 view
angular_behavior: /401 shows 401 - Unauthorized.

test_name: React placeholder mentions porting the Angular app; Angular home does not show that string
angular_behavior: App does not show the scaffold line about porting.
react_behavior: Root copy tells the user to port from ../src (stub).

test_name: main React heading uses Admin Dashboard — React; Angular has no H1 with that string
angular_behavior: No H1 with em dash and React product name.

test_name: payment orders has column filter placeholder for currency in Angular; React not present
angular_behavior: Per-column search including "Search by Currency".

test_name: forbidden page offers Logout control in Angular; React has no Logout on /403
angular_behavior: Logout button on forbidden page.

test_name: not-found page links to home with Go to Homepage in Angular; React has no such link
angular_behavior: Link ""Go to Homepage"" on 404.
react_behavior: No such link; stub page only.

test_name: unauthorized page links to Login in Angular; React has no Login link on /401
angular_behavior: Link ""Login"" on 401.

test_name: login shows invalid credentials message after bad password in Angular; React has no login flow to show it
angular_behavior: Message "Invalid email or password" after failed login.
react_behavior: No login or error text on the React side.
